_info.name: vLLM Local Engine
_info.description: Local LLM inference engine via vLLM's OpenAI-compatible REST API. Serves open-weight models (Llama, Mistral, Qwen, etc.) locally with GPU acceleration. Bridged to MCP via the openai-mcp-server adapter.

vllm.description: Routes LLM calls to a local vLLM server via OpenAI-compatible API. No cloud, no cost, no data leaving the machine.
